ValidationRule.description: Reason if Sales Rejected if Sales not accepted by any reason listed in the drop.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( AND( $User.ProfileName__c = "PROFILE: PKI Sales", RecordType.DeveloperName = "PKI_Americas_SPI", ISCHANGED(StageName), TEXT(PRIORVALUE(StageName))="Zero Stage", OR( ISPICKVAL(Sales_Accepted_Lead__c, ""), AND( OR ( ISPICKVAL(Sales_Accepted_Lead__c,"Rejected: Duplicate"), ISPICKVAL(Sales_Accepted_Lead__c,"Rejected: Not Valid"), ISPICKVAL(Sales_Accepted_Lead__c,"Rejected: Future Opportunity") ), ISBLANK(Reason_if_Sales_Rejected__c) ) ) ), TRUE, FALSE )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Opportunity cannot be progressed without accepting or rejecting opportunity (section 1G). If rejected, reason must be provided.
